name: PicketScan
description: Scan code and pipeline artifacts for secrets with Picket.
helpMarkDown: Runs the Picket CLI. Keep live verification and remote source enumeration explicit so pipeline authors can see when provider APIs may be contacted.
author: willibrandon

inputs.name: target
inputs.label: Target
inputs.helpMarkDown: File, directory, or checked-out repository path to scan.

inputs.name: picketPath
inputs.label: Picket executable
inputs.helpMarkDown: Path to the Picket executable or command name available on PATH.

inputs.name: config
inputs.label: Config
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional Picket or Gitleaks-compatible configuration path.

inputs.name: profile
inputs.label: Profile
inputs.helpMarkDown: Scan profile. Use gitleaks only when strict compatibility behavior is desired.

inputs.name: reportFormats
inputs.label: Report formats
inputs.helpMarkDown: Comma-separated report formats: json, jsonl, sarif, html, csv, junit, gitlab, toon. JSONL is added internally when omitted so task outputs and annotations stay accurate.

inputs.name: reportDirectory
inputs.label: Report directory
inputs.helpMarkDown: Directory where task reports are written.

inputs.name: failOn
inputs.label: Fail on
inputs.helpMarkDown: Task failure policy. Scanner execution errors always fail the task; never only suppresses finding-based failure.

inputs.name: baselinePath
inputs.label: Baseline path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional baseline report used to suppress known findings.

inputs.name: results
inputs.label: Result filter
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional comma-separated validation states to keep before reports and failure enforcement.

inputs.name: onlyVerified
inputs.label: Only verified
inputs.helpMarkDown: Keep only offline structurally valid findings and live active findings.

inputs.name: redact
inputs.label: Redaction percent
inputs.helpMarkDown: Redaction percentage from 0 through 100.

inputs.name: verify
inputs.label: Live verification
inputs.helpMarkDown: Enable opt-in live provider verification.

inputs.name: annotations
inputs.label: Annotations
inputs.helpMarkDown: Emit safe Azure DevOps log issues for findings with source locations.

inputs.name: annotationLimit
inputs.label: Annotation limit
inputs.helpMarkDown: Maximum number of log issues emitted by the task. Use 0 to disable annotation output.

inputs.name: publishSarif
inputs.label: Publish SARIF
inputs.helpMarkDown: Publish the SARIF report as a build artifact when it exists.

inputs.name: publishJsonl
inputs.label: Publish JSONL
inputs.helpMarkDown: Publish the native JSONL report as a build artifact when it exists.

inputs.name: publishHtml
inputs.label: Publish HTML
inputs.helpMarkDown: Publish the HTML report as a build artifact when it exists.

inputs.name: cache
inputs.label: Use scan cache
inputs.helpMarkDown: Pass a native Picket scan cache directory to the CLI.

inputs.name: cacheMode
inputs.label: Cache mode
inputs.helpMarkDown: Cache storage mode. Use raw only in trusted private jobs.

inputs.name: cachePath
inputs.label: Cache path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Cache directory passed to the CLI.

inputs.name: maxTargetMegabytes
inputs.label: Max target MB
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional positive maximum file size in decimal MB for content rules.

inputs.name: maxArchiveDepth
inputs.label: Max archive depth
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional maximum nested archive traversal depth.

inputs.name: maxArchiveEntries
inputs.label: Max archive entries
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional maximum number of files extracted from archives.

inputs.name: maxArchiveMegabytes
inputs.label: Max archive MB
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional maximum decompressed archive payload in decimal MB.

inputs.name: maxArchiveRatio
inputs.label: Max archive ratio
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional maximum archive expansion ratio.

inputs.name: timeout
inputs.label: Timeout seconds
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional scan timeout in seconds. Use 0 to disable.

inputs.name: azureDevOpsOrganization
inputs.label: Azure DevOps organization
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional organization name or URL for remote Azure DevOps enumeration.

inputs.name: azureDevOpsEndpoint
inputs.label: Azure DevOps endpoint
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional endpoint override for Azure DevOps Server.

inputs.name: azureDevOpsTokenEnv
inputs.label: Azure DevOps token environment variable
inputs.helpMarkDown: Environment variable containing the PAT or job token. The token value is not passed on the command line.

inputs.name: azureDevOpsTokenKind
inputs.label: Azure DevOps token kind
inputs.helpMarkDown: Credential transport: pat for personal access tokens or bearer for job and Entra tokens.

inputs.name: azureDevOpsProject
inputs.label: Azure DevOps project
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional project filter.

inputs.name: azureDevOpsRepository
inputs.label: Azure DevOps repository
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional repository filter.

inputs.name: azureDevOpsBranch
inputs.label: Azure DevOps branch
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional branch name.

inputs.name: azureDevOpsPullRequest
inputs.label: Azure DevOps pull request
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional pull request ID to scan.

inputs.name: azureDevOpsIncludeWikis
inputs.label: Include wikis
inputs.helpMarkDown: Include Azure DevOps wiki backing repositories.

inputs.name: azureDevOpsBuildId
inputs.label: Azure DevOps build ID
inputs.helpMarkDown: Build ID used when scanning build artifacts or build logs.

inputs.name: azureDevOpsIncludeArtifacts
inputs.label: Include build artifacts
inputs.helpMarkDown: Include build artifact contents for the selected build.

inputs.name: azureDevOpsIncludeLogs
inputs.label: Include build logs
inputs.helpMarkDown: Include build logs for the selected build.

inputs.name: azureDevOpsReleaseId
inputs.label: Azure DevOps release ID
inputs.helpMarkDown: Classic release ID used when scanning release build artifacts.

inputs.name: azureDevOpsIncludeReleaseArtifacts
inputs.label: Include release artifacts
inputs.helpMarkDown: Include build artifact contents referenced by the selected classic release.

inputs.name: azureDevOpsIncludePackages
inputs.label: Include Azure Artifacts packages
inputs.helpMarkDown: Include the latest NuGet package versions from readable Azure Artifacts feeds.

inputs.name: azureDevOpsFeed
inputs.label: Azure Artifacts feed
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional feed name or ID filter.

inputs.name: azureDevOpsPackage
inputs.label: Azure Artifacts NuGet package
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional exact NuGet package name filter.

inputs.name: azureDevOpsPackageVersion
inputs.label: Azure Artifacts package version
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional exact NuGet package version. Requires an exact package name.

inputs.name: azureDevOpsMaxArtifactMegabytes
inputs.label: Max artifact MB
inputs.helpMarkDown: Positive per-artifact archive download cap.

inputs.name: azureDevOpsMaxLogMegabytes
inputs.label: Max log MB
inputs.helpMarkDown: Positive per-log download cap.

inputs.name: azureDevOpsMaxPackageMegabytes
inputs.label: Max package MB
inputs.helpMarkDown: Positive per-package archive download cap. Requires Azure Artifacts package scanning.

inputs.name: allowNonPublicSourceEndpoints
inputs.label: Allow non-public source endpoints
inputs.helpMarkDown: Permit private, loopback, link-local, or otherwise non-public endpoint addresses.

inputs.name: allowInsecureSourceEndpoints
inputs.label: Allow insecure source endpoints
inputs.helpMarkDown: Permit HTTP source endpoints for trusted local tests or explicitly accepted self-hosted environments.

inputs.name: extraArgs
inputs.label: Extra arguments
inputs.helpMarkDown: Additional CLI arguments appended after validated task inputs, one argument per line.

outputVariables.name: exitCode
outputVariables.description: Raw scanner exit code before task failure enforcement.

outputVariables.name: findings
outputVariables.description: Number of emitted native JSONL finding records after filters.

outputVariables.name: sarifPath
outputVariables.description: Absolute path to the SARIF report when enabled.

outputVariables.name: jsonlPath
outputVariables.description: Absolute path to the JSONL report when enabled.

outputVariables.name: htmlPath
outputVariables.description: Absolute path to the HTML report when enabled.

outputVariables.name: annotations
outputVariables.description: Number of Azure DevOps log issues emitted.
